summary: Generic S3 operations for the importer-sandbox sample: metadata tagging and versioning. Estate-agnostic sample data.

operations.title: Add a tag to an S3 bucket
operations.summary: Add a governance tag to a bucket. Metadata only — no change to its contents or access.
operations.description: Add a single new key/value tag to an existing bucket's tags map. Metadata-only — no effect on objects, policy, or access.

params.name: bucket
params.label: Bucket
params.help: The existing bucket to tag, chosen from live inventory.

params.name: tag_key
params.label: Tag key
params.help: New tag key, up to 128 chars; must not already exist on the bucket.

operations.title: Enable bucket versioning
operations.summary: Turn on versioning so object overwrites keep prior versions. Safe and additive.
operations.description: Sets the bucket's versioning configuration status to Enabled. Additive; existing objects are unaffected and prior versions are retained going forward.

params.name: bucket
params.label: Bucket
params.help: The existing bucket to modify, chosen from live inventory.

params.name: versioning_status
params.label: Versioning
params.help: Enabled keeps prior versions on overwrite; Suspended stops creating new versions.
